hypotheses.title: Raise min_transaction_value to $100K
hypotheses.description: Hypothesis: filtering to insider purchases ≥$100K (vs. current $25K) produces higher-quality picks by excluding routine small-lot grants and focusing on high-conviction, out-of-pocket capital deployment. Research (Lakonishok & Lee 2001; Cohen et al. 2012) shows large-value insider buys predict forward returns; small ones do not.

hypotheses.title: Require short interest >= 20% for earnings plays
hypotheses.description: Hypothesis: earnings_calendar has a 37.7% 7d win rate and -2.05% avg return — worst performer. APLD (30.6% SI) was consistently the highest-scoring earnings candidate in recent runs. Requiring short interest >= 20% forces the scanner to surface only setups where a positive earnings surprise can trigger forced short covering, converting a weak calendar signal into a squeeze catalyst.

hypotheses.title: Add 7% floor on distance from 52w high
hypotheses.description: Hypothesis: Minervini picks 10-25% below their 52w high significantly outperform picks already within 5% of the high (+10-11% vs +5.7% avg 20d return in 2240-pick backtest). Adding min_pct_from_high=7 filters stocks pressing prior-high resistance, where stalls and pullbacks are most likely.

hypotheses.title: Require 2+ days of elevated volume for early_accumulation signals
hypotheses.description: Hypothesis: volume_accumulation scanner with single-day spike detection produces 43.8% 7d win rate and -7.6% avg 30d return (n=19) — below coin-flip and worst 30d performer. Requiring high_vol_days_5d >= 2 (at least 2 of last 5 days above 1.5x avg volume) filters out distributional selling disguised as accumulation. Genuine institutional accumulation leaves a multi-day footprint; single-day spikes do not.

hypotheses.title: Filter momentum to confluence-only mode
hypotheses.description: Implementation hypothesis: momentum has 39.7% 7d WR standalone (worst performer, n=136) but +26.6pt WR lift when confluent with insider_buying (74.3%, n=35) and +12.3pt lift with options_flow (59.1%, n=22). Fix: filter momentum candidates to only those that also appear in [insider_buying, options_flow] within ±3 day window. Preserves confluence benefit while eliminating standalone drag. Expected outcome: improved 7d WR and avg return vs baseline momentum picks; reduced pick volume (25% of current).

hypotheses.title: Add IV skew rejection filter (skew >= 0.02)
hypotheses.description: Autopsy P&L analysis: options_flow has 42.2% 7d WR (n=83), below historical ~50% baseline. Root cause: IV skew filter added 2026-04-21 promoted strong signals to CRITICAL but never rejected high-skew bullish candidates (OTM put IV > ATM call IV indicates hedging, not bullish conviction). Fix: bullish candidates with iv_skew >= 0.02 now return None (filtered out). Candidates with iv_skew < 0.02 promoted to CRITICAL; no-IV-data candidates pass at HIGH. Expected outcome: reduce false-positive rate from put-hedging noise, move 7d WR toward 50%+.

hypotheses.title: Tighten pre-earnings window: 7 days → 3 days
hypotheses.description: Autopsy P&L analysis: earnings_play (earnings_calendar scanner) has 37.5% 7d WR (n=48), worst performer. Root cause: max_days_until_earnings=7 pulls in earnings 4-7 days out, where pre-earnings volatility setup hasn't formed yet. These are immature plays with added event-day binary risk. Fix: (1) Reduce max_days_until_earnings 7 → 3 days (closer to event = setup more likely intact), (2) Cap unmatchable candidates (no accumulation signal) at score 70 (HIGH/MEDIUM, not CRITICAL). Expected outcome: eliminate immature setups and overconfident binary trades, move 7d WR from 37.5% toward >45%.

hypotheses.title: Add intraday deduplication via scanner_picks
hypotheses.description: Autopsy P&L analysis: insider_buying 44.5% 7d WR (n=155), borderline (at 45% threshold). Fast-loop observation (2026-04-20): NKE appeared in 3/4 intraday runs same day (75→82→85 score escalation), same SEC filing. Cross-day suppress_days=3 works, but intraday repeats slip through (recommendations file written end-of-pipeline, not available at scanner start). Fix: _load_recent_insider_tickers() now reads scanner_picks/YYYY-MM-DD.json (written immediately after scanner, before pipeline end). Intraday dedup now works. Expected outcome: eliminate same-day repeats, deconflate confidence scores, move 7d WR from 44.5% toward 50%+.
